debug_info.goal:
case neg.inl.fstE
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
this : @S b = true
err✝ callee✝ : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝ :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t :
  Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝ :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:

            tauto
          contradiction

aesop

          simp at this
          unfold resultSet
          cases C <;> simp [ra] <;> simp at ra <;> subst ra

          (try contradiction) <;>
          (try
            {
              aesop
            })
    case Callee =>
      sorry
    case Other =>
      sorry

(try omega) <;>
                  (try aesop) <;>
                  (try {
                    rcases σ with (_ | _) <;>
                    simp_all [Error.Dist.eval, Error.maxOne_cons] <;>
                    (try contradiction) <;>
                    (try omega) <;>
                    (try aesop)
                  })
              simp_all [Error.Dist.eval, Error.maxOne_cons]
              <;>
